name: @insitu/companion
description: Local companion process: loopback WS, project sandbox, agent edit gateway.

scripts.build: tsup src/cli.ts src/server.ts src/agent/proposals.ts src/edit/gateway.ts src/edit/mutator.ts src/edit/git.ts --format esm --dts --clean --external ws --external commander --external zod --external execa --external diff
scripts.dev: tsup src/cli.ts src/server.ts src/agent/proposals.ts src/edit/gateway.ts src/edit/mutator.ts src/edit/git.ts --format esm --watch --external ws --external commander --external zod --external execa --external diff
